code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test06-OCT-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin) further support renal dysfunction and possible tubular involvement. Low HbA1c and normal serum glucose make diabetes unlikely. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend nephrology evaluation for underlying renal pathology.
